en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 36

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 36
Top Question of the Week
How was Miami Dcentralcon and NFT Basel?!

Wow. Where to start?! After just one year being live we found ourselves at one of the highest esteemed and most pivotal art, fashion and now web3 intersecting events anywhere of the era. This is the first time that so many GDN members and DIGITALAX community members and collectors were able to meet IRL in person, talk more about the project’s mission and red pill everyone on web3 fashion and the open metaverse 😆👻
There were so many amazing memories created that we are preparing a comprehensive write up and photo album to share with the community!
Most Common Repeat Question
When does the new rewards distribution schedule begin for $MONA staking?

The new $MONA staking platform is now live here https://staking.digitalax.xyz/ and rewards will start distributing at 21:00 GMT Dec 5th… so in just a few hours! You can read the full update here in case you missed it. You can use the DIGITALAX custom bridge here to move assets from Ethereum to Polygon, or the regular Polygon bridge here.

More details on the $W3F distribution and also the retroactive and forward looking additional token rewards distribution from market activity i.e. marketplace auction events etc. will be released within the next few days as we move full steam ahead!
The DIGITALAX core team will be online to assist and support with any queries as the new staking distribution begins.
Top Controversies in the Industry

It’s becoming ever more important and critical that our communication channels become secured through decentralisation and the permissionless uncensorable nature of web3. We desperately need Dapps and platforms that can support this before we all need to turn back to samizdat as the main form and way that we channel and direct information.

Jack Dorsey resigned as the CEO of Twitter this week effective immediately to seemly dive more into web3 full time with Square, amongst other things. It’s an interesting move, and has made Twitter more vulnerable to higher censorability and the overreaching “Big Brother” practices of web2. The new CEO is already making moves for instantiating new processes and hard guidelines for restricting every users interactions on the platform.
Silly Fails and Trolling

Anyone who has built and/or is building in the open web3 bazaar knows how this high pressure cooker environment can get too even the best of us, and sometimes it can feel like the market is moving to fast to keep pace with and it’s all a bit too much.

Yet, with that said, if you are going to chart forth as a leader or team of leaders running a protocol or project in the space, then trolling back your community for non-substantive reasons isn’t at all the right way to go about it…. 🤨🧐🤔… especially when that community is what got you to where you are in the first place.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 36

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 36
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
ازاي was Miami Dcentralcon و NFT Basel?!

Wow. Where الى start?! After just one year being live we found ourselves at one من ال highest esteemed و most pivotal art, فاشون و now web3 intersecting events anywhere من ال era. This is ال first time that so many GDN members و DIGITALAX المجتمع members و collectors were able الى meet IRL في person, talk more about ال project’s mission و red pill everyone على web3 فاشون و ال open metaverse 😆👻
There were so many amazing memories created that we are preparing a comprehensive write up و photo album الى share مع ال المجتمع!
Most Common Repeat سؤال
When does ال جديد rewards distribution schedule begin لـ $MONA staking?

ال جديد $MONA staking platform is now live here https://staking.digitalax.xyz/ و rewards will start distributing at 21:00 GMT Dec 5th… so في just a few hours! You can read ال full تحديث here في case you missed it. You can use ال DIGITALAX custom bridge here الى move assets من Ethereum الى Polygon, or ال regular Polygon bridge here.

More details على ال $W3F distribution و also ال retroactive و forward looking additional token rewards distribution من market activity i.e. marketplace auction events etc. will be released within ال next few days as we move full steam ahead!
ال DIGITALAX core team will be online الى assist و support مع any queries as ال جديد staking distribution begins.
Top Controversies في ال Industry

It’s becoming ever more important و critical that our communication channels become secured through decentralisation و ال permissionless uncensorable nature من web3. We desperately need Dapps و platforms that can support this before we all need الى turn back الى samizdat as ال main form و way that we channel و direct information.

Jack Dorsey resigned as ال CEO من Twitter this اسبوع effective immediately الى seemly dive more into web3 full time مع Square, amongst other things. It’s an interesting move, و has made Twitter more vulnerable الى higher censorability و ال overreaching “Big Brother” practices من web2. ال جديد CEO is already making moves لـ instantiating جديد processes و hard guidelines لـ restricting every users interactions على ال platform.
Silly Fails و Trolling

Anyone who has built و/or is building في ال open web3 bazaar knows ازاي this high pressure cooker environment can get too even ال best من us, و sometimes it can feel like ال market is moving الى fast الى keep pace مع و it’s all a bit too much.

Yet, مع that said, if you are going الى chart forth as a leader or team من leaders running a بروتوكول or project في ال space, then trolling back your المجتمع لـ non-substantive reasons isn’t at all ال right way الى go about it…. 🤨🧐🤔… especially when that المجتمع is what got you الى where you are في ال first place.
شوف كل FUD FAQ من هنا.
